description: grāmatr hooks. SessionStart establishes the gramatr session via session_bootstrap (cwd-based project resolution + session_start; persists client_session_id↔gramatr_session_id mapping keyed by client_type in Redis with 24h TTL, configurable via BOOTSTRAP_MAPPING_TTL_SECONDS). UserPromptSubmit then rides on that mapping via route_request — the only correlation handle it needs is {client_session_id, client_type}. Stop is wired (v0.20.22 / PR-Hook-1 of #2768) via record_turn_feedback — an adapter that takes only the client_session_id + stop_reason, looks up the gramatr session, and records an auto classification-feedback signal so every turn contributes training data even when the agent skips its explicit feedback call. The architecture is client-agnostic (v0.20.18 #2756) — Claude Code is one consumer; Cursor, Codex, ChatGPT plugins drop in later by passing their own client_session_id with a matching client_type literal. SessionEnd remains absent pending the auto_save_handoff adapter (PR-Hook-2 of #2768). See #2768 for the full 5-hook queue.
